content: My son is a good boy. He works hard. He has no criminal record. He’s been practicing yoga for two years. He doesn’t even drink. Why is he being targeted? Because Anjali’s father is a government officer? Because we are middle-class and they are influential? They are twisting everything. My son called her once — a wrong number. He didn’t even know her name. The DNA? Maybe she touched something he touched. Maybe the gardener’s blood got mixed. I don’t know. But my son is innocent. The café receipt proves it. The police should investigate the neighbor who saw her with someone else. Why aren’t they questioning her?
